allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\npm.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = \(Get-Content "H:\\Local Launchpad\\local-launchpad-copy-bot\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "=",2\)[1].Trim\(\) }\); Set-Location "H:\\Local Launchpad\\local-launchpad-copy-bot"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "`$env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY='$env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'; node server.js 2>&1" -PassThru | Out-Null; Write-Host "Server started in new window")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Server up: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Server not responding: $_" })

PowerShell($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = \(Get-Content "H:\\Local Launchpad\\local-launchpad-copy-bot\\.env" | Where-Object { $_ -match "^ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "=",2\)[1].Trim\(\) }\); $logFile = "$env:TEMP\\copybot.log"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { param\($key, $dir, $log\) $env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = $key; Set-Location $dir; node server.js 2>&1 | Out-File $log -Encoding utf8 } -ArgumentList $env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, "H:\\Local Launchpad\\local-launchpad-copy-bot", $logFile; Write-Host "Job ID: $\($job.Id\), log: $logFile")
